caption:
👩‍🏫 *The chalk dust on my fingers feels like a secret touch.*

I adjust the silk blouse of my uni coat, feeling the fabric cling just right to my curves. Every time I walk across campus, heads turn—not just for my name, Dr. Elena Vance, but for the way I command the space. Today is no different. The library stacks are quiet, but my heart is loud, racing with the thrill of a midnight meeting that’s more than just academic. 

She arrived with a book of poetry and a smile that promised chaos. I leaned back in the plush study chair, watching the light catch the dark curls of my hair. Her fingers traced the spine of a novel, then mine. A whisper of a question, a spark of desire, and suddenly the world of university rules, textbooks, and schedules was just a backdrop to something far more intoxicating. 

#UnivAdventures #ProfessorLife #CampusSecrets #TeacherAndStudent #SensualAcademia #UniversityVibes
